session.user: Run the following pytest command and report results: uv run pytest tests/commands/one_shot/ -v Report all output including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on one_shot command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 33 items
tests/commands/one_shot/test_branch_name.py .... [ 12%] tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py .......... [ 42%] tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_dispatch.py ...... [ 60%] tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_json.py ...... [ 78%] tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_remote_dispatch.py ....... [100%]
============================== 33 passed in 2.17s ==============================
session.assistant:
pytest passed: 33 tests passed in 2.17s
**Summary:** - All 33 tests in `tests/commands/one_shot/` passed successfully - No failures, errors, or skips - Test modules executed: - `test_branch_name.py`: 4 passed - `test_one_shot.py`: 10 passed - `test_one_shot_dispatch.py`: 6 passed - `test_one_shot_json.py`: 6 passed - `test_one_shot_remote_dispatch.py`: 7 passed
